intended_use: BriefCase is a radiological computer aided triage and notification software indicated for use in the analysis of non-enhanced head CT images in adults or transitional adolescents aged 18 and older. Th
intended_use_full: BriefCase is a radiological computer aided triage and notification software indicated for use in the analysis of non-enhanced head CT images in adults or transitional adolescents aged 18 and older. The device is intended to assist hospital networks and appropriately trained medical specialists in workflow triage by flagging and communication of suspected positive findings of Intracranial hemorrhage (ICH) pathologies.
ground_truth: Reviewer assessment of cases identified as positive or negative for intracranial hemorrhage
other_metrics: Positive Likelihood Ratio (PLR): 18.59; Negative Likelihood Ratio (NLR): 0.04; Time-to-notification: mean 33.5 seconds (95% CI: 30.9-36.1), median 30.4 seconds, IQR 20.2 seconds
